notes: Planning manifest only. Do not create image files until prompts and filenames are reviewed.
All paths are future asset paths under assets/images/.
Use lowercase snake_case filenames and stable ids for future save-data compatibility.

assets.description: Main cozy wooden onsen home room with cats, tub, lanterns, plants, and soft steam.
assets.prompt: Warm watercolor storybook Japanese onsen bathhouse interior, cozy wooden room, cats resting calmly, lantern glow, plants, noren curtain, cream and cocoa-brown palette, pastel accents, rounded handmade shapes, subtle steam, mobile vertical background, no text.

assets.description: Evening bathhouse variation with warm lamps and deeper but still soft colors.
assets.prompt: Warm evening watercolor onsen bathhouse interior, soft lamp glow, wooden bath, calm rescued cats, pale steam, muted blue night outside windows, cocoa-brown outlines, handmade storybook texture, no text.

assets.description: Puzzle/search area with bath stones, shelves, bubbles, and mist for cat discovery.
assets.prompt: Warm watercolor puzzle search area inside a misty Japanese onsen bathhouse, soft wooden shelves, bath stones, translucent bubbles, cocoa-brown ink outlines, pastel colors, cozy rescue mood, mobile vertical composition, no text.

assets.description: Misty mountain path near the hidden bathhouse for outside discovery moments.
assets.prompt: Soft watercolor mountain forest path near a hidden Japanese onsen, gentle mist, wooden bridge hint, warm cream light, muted greens, cocoa-brown linework, cozy cat rescue fantasy mood, no text.

assets.description: Soft reveal stage where a cat silhouette emerges from steam and bubbles.
assets.prompt: Soft watercolor reveal stage, rescued cat silhouette area in pale onsen steam, warm cream background, gentle light, rounded bubbles, pastel sparkles, storybook paper texture, mobile vertical composition, no text.

assets.description: Base round seated cream cat body with blank face area for layered features.
